headline: Broadridge Deploys Agentic AI at Institutional Scale Across Capital Markets and Wealth Operations
summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions (NYSE: BR) today announced that its agentic AI capabilities — software that autonomously analyzes, prioritizes, and resolves operational exceptions without constant human instruction — are live in production, spanning capital markets and wealth management workflows. New clients can achieve up to 30% Day 1 operational cost reduction through two AI partnership paths: full managed services, where Broadridge runs operations end-to-end, or standalone deployment of Broad
